message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 40
  BoxPadding 10
  LifeLineBorderColor #888888
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ActorBorderColor #666666
  ActorBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E9E9F7
  NoteBackgroundColor #FFFEDB
  NoteBorderColor #999999
}

actor User
participant Application
participant "«engine»\nAuto SDK Engine" as Engine #87CEFA
participant "«avs»\nAlexa" as Alexa #CCFFCC

alt "Activating Trial"
note over Application
clicks `Activate Trial` button
on screen to activate
trial up-sell.
end note
Application -> Engine : Publish SendConnectivityEvent message specifying **ACTIVATE_TRIAL** event
else "Activating Paid Plan"
note over Application
clicks `Activate Paid Plan` button
on screen to activate
paid plan up-sell.
end note
Application -> Engine : Publish SendConnectivityEvent message specifying **ACTIVATE_PAID_PLAN** event
end

activate Engine
Engine -> Alexa : InitiateDataPlanSubscription event

alt "Successful in sending event to Alexa"
Engine <-- Alexa : Receive SendConnectivityEventReply message with **SUCCESS** status
else "on failure"
Engine <-- Alexa : Receive SendConnectivityEventReply message with **FAIL** status
end
deactivate Engine

@enduml
